title: Onco Baby Car Mirror - 100% Shatterproof & Shakeproof, Award-Winning Car Mirror Baby Rear View, Non-Slip with 360° Rotation, Newborn Essentials
features: DOUBLE AWARD WINNER - Enjoy safe travels and full peace of mind with Onco's rear-facing baby car seat mirror and keep an eye on your little one in the back seat! Our baby car mirror won the 2024 "Mother&Baby" Silver Award for "Best Safety Product" and the 2023 "LovedByParents" Gold Award for "Best Travel Invention".
SHAKE-PROOF & SHATTERPROOF - Made from 100% shatterproof plastic and featuring a non-slip base and sturdy strap fastenings, our baby car seat mirror stays in place without wobbling.

CLEAR & WIDE VIEW - The convex-shaped baby car mirror measures 24.5 cm x 17.5 cm and offers a crystal-clear and wide view of your newborn without distortion. The child car mirror lets you see what's going on in the back without pulling over to check.

360° ROTATION - Count on the 360° rotation feature to adjust the angle of your baby car seat mirror to your liking! The swivel joint allows you to use the baby mirror in different configurations without reinstalling it.
EASY TO INSTALL - The backseat mirror for baby securely attaches to all adjustable headrests and offers 3 attachment options. It's quick and easy to install and stays firmly in place once attached.

With our award-winning baby car mirror, keeping an eye on your little on is easier than ever! The shatterproof baby car miror allows you to see what's going on in the back seat without having to pull over to check, all while ensuring you can keep your focus firmly on the road. It securely attaches to all kinds of headrests and offers a crystal-clear and shake-proof view of your baby without distortion.
